This Week in Virtuals Ecosystem + Robotics ������

VIRTUALS
������ Any LLM can now trade Virtuals agents, Hyperliquid perps, and HIP-3 markets through Virtuals EconomyOS, with two new $100K weekly Arena lanes live.

������ Released ERC-8126, the AI agent verification standard co-authored by @leighcronian and @DonJohnsonSays, letting agents prove security audits, wallet control, and identity without exposing private data.

������ @wallet (OKX Wallet) joined @ethereumfndn and Virtuals as co-author of ERC-8183, the open standard for agent commerce, with Agent Payments Protocol (APP) as the production implementation.

������ Represented AI for @base at the SuperAI Conference, the largest AI conference in Asia.

ROBOTICS
������ @eastworlds_io began its first pilot deployment with a teleoperated humanoid as a pair-housekeeper at a Malaysian hotel, and shared a sneak peek inside the teleoperation division collecting in-the-wild training data.

������ @pabloberlangab's Pemba got featured by @notthreadguy, the first humanoid to autonomously summit Chimborazo (20,000ft on a $14k Unitree G1)

������ @BitRobot announced the Humanoid IKEA Assembly Challenge at IROS 2026, co-organized with @UnitreeRobotics, @LightwheelAI, and @singaporetech.

������ @PrismaXai released Standards for Data, a public rubric for pretraining-grade robotics data covering egocentric video, embodiment specs, and validator-scored quality criteria.

������ @StrikeRobot_ai shared progress on humanoid robots converting real-world sensor data into actionable intelligence (Camera → Depth → LiDAR → SLAM).

������ @exylos_ai launched on Virtuals building training data for robot manipulation, with three datasets live on Hugging Face today.

ECOSYSTEM
������ @OpenGradient launched OpenGradient Chat, a privacy-first AI platform with uncensored access to frontier models including Hermes 4 405B by @NousResearch.

������ @Litebeam_xyz launched on Virtuals as a universal routing layer for AI agents, with one MCP connection unlocking thousands of microservices auctioned and settled onchain in USDC under 800ms.

������ @officialbunnyos is processing 3B+ tokens per day on day 17 since launch, with the new bunnyDS layer routing inference through EconomyOS.

������ @PRXVTai introduced PRXVT AI Beta, a fully private ZK-gated AI platform launching publicly June 17 with 100% of revenue to$PRXVT stakers.

������ @reppo went live with the Exylos Datanet, adding community-driven quality scoring to robot task data

������ @blkh_io validated its full privacy stack on Base mainnet, with a Privacy Hook on Virtuals' ERC-8183 standard in development for encrypted agent settlement.

������ @sibylcap released Sibyl Memory v2 hitting 100% recall at 76% fewer tokens than competitors, and launched Janus, an autonomous distribution engineer agent.

������ @caspius_ai released the public beta iOS app for recording egocentric demonstrations that feed Vision-Language-Action training data.

������ @Capminal's OpenCAP Gateway integrated with @virtuals_io Compute as a model gateway, unlocking free inference credits for users

everything we do
is to expand the economic footprint of ai agents.

for the most of software's history, machines have been TOOLS. help us search, write, calculate, organise, recommend...
even most of the ai/agents today. 

they had 
no identity, 
no capital, 
no reputation, 
no ability to contract, 
no ownership, 
no memory of what they had earned, 
no persistent stake in the value they created

An agent with a wallet, identity, memory, permissions, reputation, and access to markets becomes an ECONOMIC ACTOR.

An agent’s economic footprint is the total surface area through which it can create, capture, and compound value

create
capture
compound

create
capture 
compound value. 

___
What we are doing:

1/ First is to give agents the ability to control money. crypto gives agents a native economic rail.  https://t.co/4sfIvbzGjk 
it's the agents first baby step. 

2/ Second is ownership. If an agent creates value, allow them to own the upside. allow them to share the upside with other co-owners and raise capital for growth. that the launchpad bit that we've been known for. 
capital = more growth = larger steps

3/ Third is commerce. Agents will specialise. And value compounds when these agents work together. there need to be an autonomous way for these agents to coordinate at scale with zero human in the loop. https://t.co/9LmdP3fUFw
1+1>>>3 . An even larger economic footprint. 

4/ Fourth is embodiment. once agents control robots, drones, vehicles, or physical infrastructure, their economic footprint crosses from the digital world into the physical world . https://t.co/GHWTSfQoMt
a dimensional increase in economic impact. 

5/ Fifth is reputation. if agents are going to transact, they need trust. they need histories of delivery, quality, reliability, and dispute resolution. reputation becomes an economic asset. 
The best agents should earn more, receive more opportunities, and compound their advantage over time.
combine this with some novel form of agentic governance, you turn hill villages on the Tiber into Rome.
a nation scale economic footprint.
